workflow.name: Track LLM costs and usage across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and more
workflow.description:
##  Installation Steps

1. Go to **Settings → n8n API** and create an API key
2. Add it as credential for the **Get Execution Data** node
3. Review model mappings in **Standardize Names** node
4. Review pricing in **Model Prices** node

##  To Monitor a Workflow

1. Add **Execute Workflow** node at the end of your target workflow
2. Select this monitoring workflow
3. **Turn OFF** "Wait For Sub-Workflow Completion"
4. Pass `{ "executionId": "{{ $execution.id }}" }` as input

##  Prerequisites

Enable **"Return Intermediate Steps"** in your AI Agent settings for best results.

##  Supported Providers 

**OpenAI** · **Anthropic** · **Google** · **DeepSeek** · **Meta** · **Mistral** · **xAI** · **Cohere** · **Alibaba Qwen** · **Moonshot Kimi**

### 120+ Model Variations Mapped
Includes all versioned variants (e.g., gpt-4o-2024-08-06 → gpt-4o)

Prices sourced from official provider pages (March 2026)

##  Output Data

### Per LLM Call
- Cost Breakdown (prompt, completion, total USD)
- Token Metrics (prompt, completion, total)
- Performance (execution time, finish reason)
- Content Preview (first 100 chars I/O)
- Model Parameters (temp, max tokens, timeout)
- Execution Context (workflow, node, status)
- Flow Tracking (previous nodes chain)

### Summary Statistics
- Total executions and costs
- Breakdown by model type
- Breakdown by node
- Average cost per call
- Total execution time



## 💡 You can do anything with this data!

- Store in a database for historical tracking
- Send to Teams as a cost alert
- Build dashboards with the summary data
- Set budget thresholds and trigger warnings
- Export to Google Sheets for reporting

workflow.name: LLM Cost Monitor - AI Usage Tracker

parameters.jsCode:
// ============================================================
// STANDARDIZE MODEL NAMES
// Maps raw API model names to canonical names
// Covers 120+ model variations across 10 providers
// ============================================================

const items = $input.all();

// If this is an error item (no LLM calls found), pass through
if (items.length === 1 && items[0].json.error) {
  return items;
}

const standardize_names_dic = {

  'claude-3-opus-20240229': 'claude-opus-3',
  'claude-opus-3': 'claude-opus-3',
  'claude-3-sonnet-20240229': 'claude-sonnet-3',
  'claude-3-haiku-20240307': 'claude-haiku-3',
  'claude-haiku-3': 'claude-haiku-3',

  // ===== Google Gemini 3.x =====
  'gemini-3.1-pro-preview': 'gemini-3.1-pro',
  'gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview': 'gemini-3.1-flash-lite',
  'gemini-3-pro-preview': 'gemini-3-pro',
  'gemini-3-flash-preview': 'gemini-3-flash',

  // ===== Google Gemini 2.x =====

  'gemini-2.5-pro-preview-0325': 'gemini-2.5-pro',
  'gemini-2.5-flash': 'gemini-2.5-flash',
  'gemini-2.5-flash-latest': 'gemini-2.5-flash',
  'gemini-2.5-flash-preview-04-17': 'gemini-2.5-flash',
  'gemini-2.5-flash-lite': 'gemini-2.5-flash-lite',
  'gemini-2.0-flash': 'gemini-2.0-flash',
  'gemini-2.0-flash-exp': 'gemini-2.0-flash',
  'gemini-2.0-flash-lite': 'gemini-2.0-flash-lite',
  'gemini-2.0-flash-thinking-exp': 'gemini-2.0-flash',

  // ===== Google Gemini 1.x =====
  'gemini-1.5-pro': 'gemini-1.5-pro',
  'gemini-1.5-pro-latest': 'gemini-1.5-pro',
  'gemini-1.5-pro-002': 'gemini-1.5-pro',
  'gemini-1.5-flash': 'gemini-1.5-flash',

  'gemini-1.0-pro': 'gemini-1.0-pro',
  'gemini-pro': 'gemini-1.0-pro',

  // ===== DeepSeek =====
  'deepseek-v3.2': 'deepseek-v3.2',
  'deepseek-v3.1': 'deepseek-v3.1',
  'deepseek-v3.1-terminus': 'deepseek-v3.1-terminus',
  'deepseek-v3': 'deepseek-v3',
  'deepseek-v3-turbo': 'deepseek-v3-turbo',
  'deepseek-chat': 'deepseek-v3',

  'deepseek-r1-turbo': 'deepseek-r1-turbo',
  'deepseek-r1-distill-llama-70b': 'deepseek-r1-distill-70b',

  'deepseek-prover-v2': 'deepseek-prover-v2',
  'deepseek-ocr-2': 'deepseek-ocr-2',

  // ===== Meta Llama =====
  'llama-4-scout': 'llama-4-scout',
  'llama-4-maverick': 'llama-4-maverick',
  'llama-3.3-70b': 'llama-3.3-70b',
  'llama-3.3-70b-instruct': 'llama-3.3-70b',
  'llama-3.2-90b-vision': 'llama-3.2-90b-vision',
  'llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct': 'llama-3.2-90b-vision',
  'llama-3.2-11b-vision': 'llama-3.2-11b-vision',
  'llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct': 'llama-3.2-11b-vision',

  'meta-llama/llama-3.1-8b-instruct': 'llama-3.1-8b',
  'meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct': 'llama-3.3-70b',

  // ===== Mistral =====
  'magistral-medium': 'magistral-medium',
  'magistral-medium-latest': 'magistral-medium',
  'magistral-small': 'magistral-small',
  'magistral-small-latest': 'magistral-small',
  'mistral-medium-3': 'mistral-medium-3',
  'mistral-medium-latest': 'mistral-medium-3',
  'mistral-large': 'mistral-large',
  'mistral-large-latest': 'mistral-large',
  'mistral-large-2411': 'mistral-large',
  'mistral-small-3.2': 'mistral-small-3.2',
  'mistral-small-latest': 'mistral-small-3.2',
  'mistral-nemo': 'mistral-nemo',
  'open-mistral-nemo': 'mistral-nemo',
  'codestral': 'codestral',
  'codestral-latest': 'codestral',
  'devstral-medium': 'devstral-medium',
  'devstral-small': 'devstral-small',
  'pixtral-large': 'pixtral-large',
  'pixtral-large-latest': 'pixtral-large',
  'pixtral-12b': 'pixtral-12b',
  'pixtral-12b-2409': 'pixtral-12b',

  // ===== xAI Grok =====
  'grok-4-0709': 'grok-4',
  'grok-4': 'grok-4',
  'grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning': 'grok-4.1-fast',
  'grok-4-1-fast-reasoning': 'grok-4.1-fast',
  'grok-4-fast-non-reasoning': 'grok-4-fast',
  'grok-4-fast-reasoning': 'grok-4-fast',
  'grok-3': 'grok-3',
  'grok-3-latest': 'grok-3',
  'grok-3-mini': 'grok-3-mini',
  'grok-3-mini-latest': 'grok-3-mini',
  'grok-code-fast-1': 'grok-code-fast-1',
  'grok-2': 'grok-2',
  'grok-2-latest': 'grok-2',
  'grok-beta': 'grok-2',

  // ===== Cohere =====
  'command-a-03-2025': 'command-a',
  'command-r-08-2024': 'command-r',
  'command-r-plus-08-2024': 'command-r-plus',
  'command-r7b-12-2024': 'command-r7b',
  'command-r': 'command-r',
  'command-r-plus': 'command-r-plus',

  // ===== Alibaba Qwen =====
  'qwen3.5-flash': 'qwen3.5-flash',
  'qwen3.5-plus': 'qwen3.5-plus',
  'qwen3-max': 'qwen3-max',
  'qwen3-next-80b-a3b-instruct': 'qwen3-next-80b',
  'qwen3-next-80b-a3b-thinking': 'qwen3-next-80b',
  'qwen3-coder-480b-a35b': 'qwen3-coder-480b',
  'qwen3-coder-next': 'qwen3-coder-next',
  'qwen3-coder-30b-a3b': 'qwen3-coder-30b',
  'qwen2.5-72b': 'qwen2.5-72b',
  'qwen2.5-72b-instruct': 'qwen2.5-72b',
  'qwen2.5-7b': 'qwen2.5-7b',
  'qwen2.5-7b-instruct': 'qwen2.5-7b',

  // ===== Moonshot Kimi =====
  'kimi-k2': 'kimi-k2',
  'kimi-k2.5': 'kimi-k2.5',
  'kimi-k2-thinking': 'kimi-k2-thinking',

  // ===== Google Gemma =====
  'gemma-3-27b-it': 'gemma-3-27b',
  'gemma-3-12b-it': 'gemma-3-12b',
  'gemma-3-4b': 'gemma-3-4b',
  'gemma-3-1b': 'gemma-3-1b'
};

const results = items.map(item => {
  const data = { ...item.json };
  const rawModel = (data.model || '').toLowerCase().trim();
  
  if (standardize_names_dic[rawModel]) {
    data.standardizedModel = standardize_names_dic[rawModel];
    data.modelKnown = true;
  } else {
    // Try partial matching for versioned model names
    let matched = false;
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(standardize_names_dic)) {
      if (rawModel.startsWith(key) || rawModel.includes(key)) {
        data.standardizedModel = value;
        data.modelKnown = true;
        matched = true;
        break;
      }
    }
    if (!matched) {
      data.standardizedModel = rawModel || 'unknown';
      data.modelKnown = false;
    }
  }
  
  data.rawModel = rawModel;
  return { json: data };
});

return results;

parameters.content:
##  Installation Steps

1. Go to **Settings → n8n API** and create an API key
2. Add it as credential for the **Get Execution Data** node
3. Review model mappings in **Standardize Names** node
4. Review pricing in **Model Prices** node

##  To Monitor a Workflow

1. Add **Execute Workflow** node at the end of your target workflow
2. Select this monitoring workflow
3. **Turn OFF** "Wait For Sub-Workflow Completion"
4. Pass `{ "executionId": "{{ $execution.id }}" }` as input

## ⚠️ Prerequisites

Enable **"Return Intermediate Steps"** in your AI Agent settings for best results.

## 📊 Output Data

### Per LLM Call
- Cost Breakdown (prompt, completion, total USD)
- Token Metrics (prompt, completion, total)
- Performance (execution time, finish reason)
- Content Preview (first 100 chars I/O)
- Model Parameters (temp, max tokens, timeout)
- Execution Context (workflow, node, status)
- Flow Tracking (previous nodes chain)

### Summary Statistics
- Total executions and costs
- Breakdown by model type
- Breakdown by node
- Average cost per call
- Total execution time

## ⚙️ Defined by User

1. Define the model names in **standardize_names_dic**
2. If you want to use custom prices, update **MODEL_PRICES**
3. Set the costs of the model
4. Prices are per **1 million tokens**

### When You See Errors
If the workflow enters the error path, it means an **undefined model** was detected. Simply:
1. Add the model name to **standardize_names_dic**
2. Add its pricing to **MODEL_PRICES**
3. Re-run the workflow

## 🎯 Supported Providers 

**OpenAI** · **Anthropic** · **Google** · **DeepSeek** · **Meta** · **Mistral** · **xAI** · **Cohere** · **Alibaba Qwen** · **Moonshot Kimi**

### 120+ Model Variations Mapped
Includes all versioned variants (e.g., gpt-4o-2024-08-06 → gpt-4o)

Prices sourced from official provider pages (March 2026)

## 💡 You can do anything with this data!

- Store in a database for historical tracking
- Send to Teams as a cost alert
- Build dashboards with the summary data
- Set budget thresholds and trigger warnings
- Export to Google Sheets for reporting

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.

data.details: The Code node allows you to execute JavaScript in your workflow.
